<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if DOWN reversed the UP movement
after = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current shape positions after DOWN:")
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")

# Check white dot positions
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  White dot at: {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
